title: Throat irritation in the classroom? 7 herbal tinctures for teachers
description: Ulmus rubra tinctures have been traditionally used to help soothe throat irritation. This is due to the presence of compounds like salicin, tannins, and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These constituents help to reduce swelling and ease the discomfort associated with a sore throat.  When using Ulmus rubra tinctures for throat irritation, start by mixing 20-30 drops of the tincture with water and gargling several times before swallowing. This can be ...
